settings.heading: How fast is delivery in Greater Vancouver?
settings.row_content: We offer express local delivery across Greater Vancouver. Estimated delivery time is 60–120 minutes, depending on location, traffic, and external conditions.

settings.heading: Do you offer overnight delivery?
settings.row_content: Yes. Overnight express delivery is available in select areas. Pricing depends on distance and time window and will be shown at checkout.

settings.heading: Is your delivery discreet?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. All orders are delivered in plain, unmarked packaging. Our couriers never disclose the contents of your order.

settings.heading: What areas do you deliver to?
settings.row_content: We deliver across Greater Vancouver and selected surrounding regions, including parts of the Fraser Valley and Sea-to-Sky Corridor. A full list of delivery zones and pricing is available on our Delivery Policy page.

settings.heading: Can I return intimate products?
settings.row_content: Due to hygiene and safety reasons, intimate products and sex toys are final sale and cannot be returned or exchanged unless they are defective.

settings.heading: What if my item arrives damaged or defective?
settings.row_content: If you receive a defective item, please contact us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos. Approved defective items will be replaced.

settings.heading: Is my privacy protected?
settings.row_content: Yes. We respect your privacy at every step — from discreet packaging to secure handling of your personal information.

settings.heading: Do I need to confirm my age to shop?
settings.row_content: Yes. Our store is intended for customers 18 years and older. By using this website, you confirm that you meet the legal age requirement.
